page.title: Project Context
page.subtitle: Markdown under the configured roots (specs, docs, insights) that agents and skills can attach as review context.

row.usedByAgents: Used by {count, plural, one {# agent} other {# agents}}

drawer.loadError: Could not load this document's content.

empty.title: No project-context documents
empty.body: No .md files were found under the configured roots for this repo. Clone or index the repo, then reload.

noRepo.title: No repository selected
noRepo.body: Select a repository to browse its project-context documents.

error.title: Could not load documents
error.body: The engine could not list this repository's project-context documents.

preview.placeholder: Select a document from the list to preview its content.
preview.editNote: Read-only raw source. Project-context documents are attached from an agent or skill's Context tab, not edited here.
preview.loadError: Could not load this document's content.

tab.title: Context
tab.heading: Project context
tab.hint: Attach repo docs to inject as untrusted ## Project context. Drag to set the injection order.
tab.empty: No project-context documents were found for the active repo.
tab.noRepo: Select a repository to attach project-context documents.
tab.overBudget: Over budget: {tokens} of {budget} tokens. Documents past the budget are dropped whole at review time.

manifest.label: Serializes as
manifest.empty: Attach documents to preview how they serialize.

skippedReason.not_found: not found in the reviewed clone
